game_name: Disney's Magical Quest 3 Starring Mickey & Donald

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this game

special_mechanics.name: Outfit System
special_mechanics.description: Character can change outfits that modify movement and special abilities. Standard outfit allows grabbing and spin-throwing objects. Magician outfit enables magic blasts and underwater breathing. Firefighter uniform provides water spray weapon. Mountain-climbing gear includes grappling hook mechanics.

special_mechanics.name: Grappling Hook (Mountain Climbing Gear)
special_mechanics.description: Allows attachment to certain objects, hoisting, swinging, and grabbing items and enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay descriptions but no precise physics parameters, movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system data. Game mechanics are outfit-dependent but technical specifications are not documented.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Disney's Magical Quest series article
